name: DECODEM: Data Extraction from Corporate Organizational Documents via Enhanced Methods
summary: arXiv:2607.15879v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Much empirical legal research depends on translating unstructured text into structured variables. In corporate governance research as elsew...
description: arXiv:2607.15879v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Much empirical legal research depends on translating unstructured text into structured variables. In corporate governance research as elsewhere, this translation has traditionally relied on human coding of documents such as charters and bylaws, a process that is costly, difficult to scale, and often opaque. This paper introduces DECODEM,...
author: Jens Frankenreiter
